name: WinWay Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: WinWay Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies integrated circuit testing interfaces worldwide. Its products include high performance heat sinks, high performance test sockets, thermal control systems, changeover kits, direct docking probe cards, burn-in sockets, and contact element products. It also provides technical support services. The company serves semiconductor, opto-electronic, and IT industries. WinWay Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
